title: Quake 3 Arena on PowerMac G4
description: Installation guide, high-performance configs, and renderer tweaks for smooth 125fps gameplay on Radeon 9000 cards.
author: Altivec Gaming
content:
Quake 3 on G4

Runs flawlessly at 125fps on most G4s.

Performance Config

Set com_maxfps 125, r_dynamiclight 0, r_textureMode GL_LINEAR_MIPMAP_NEAREST.
